Action.de: Aktion für den Datentransfer (z.B. Anlegen, Ändern, Löschen)
Action.en: Action for the data transfer (e.g. create, update, delete)

AdditionalAddress.en: Additional address of a contact person or provider

AdditionalCostsPerSqmFrom.en: Additional costs per square meter starting from a given value

Age.de: Altersangabe der Immobilie oder des Gebäudes
Age.en: Age information of the property or building

AgricultureAndForestry.en: Property type for agricultural and forestry real estate

Auction.en: Foreclosure auction information of the property

Basement.en: Basement or cellar information of the property

BiddingProcess.en: Bidding process information for the property

Check.en: Check information in the data transfer process

ContactPerson.en: Contact person of the provider for the property

Data.en: General data container in the OpenImmo format

Development.en: Development/utility connection status of the plot

Evaluation.en: Evaluation and valuation information of the property

ExternalCommission.en: External commission (buyer's commission) for the property

Field.en: Single data field in the OpenImmo format

Geo.de: Geografische und adressbasierte Angaben der Immobilie
Geo.en: Geographic and address-based information of the property

HallsStorageProduction.en: Commercial property of type hall, storage or production

Hospitality.en: Commercial property of type hospitality or accommodation

LocationInBuilding.en: Position of the unit within the building (e.g. left, right, center)

MinRentalPeriod.en: Minimum rental period of the property

NetRentPerSqmFrom.de: Netto-Miete pro Quadratmeter ab einem Mindestwert
NetRentPerSqmFrom.en: Net rent per square meter starting from a minimum value

OfficePractices.de: Gewerbeobjekt vom Typ Büro oder Praxis
OfficePractices.en: Commercial property of type office or medical practice

OpenImmo.en: Root element of the OpenImmo data format

OtherEmail.en: Additional email address of a contact person

OtherPhone.en: Additional phone number of a contact person

Photo.de: Foto eines Ansprechpartners oder der Immobilie
Photo.en: Photo of a contact person or the property

PriceTimeUnit.en: Time unit for the price specification (e.g. per day, week, month)

PropertyManagement.en: Property management information of the real estate

PropertyText.de: Einzelner Freitext zur Immobilie mit Sprach- und Typangabe
PropertyText.en: Single free text for the property with language and type specification

RealEstate.en: Single real estate property with all its data

SalesStatus.en: Sales status of the property (e.g. available, reserved, sold)

Services.en: Services offered for the property or by the provider

TotalCostsPerSqmFrom.de: Gesamtkosten pro Quadratmeter ab einem Mindestwert
TotalCostsPerSqmFrom.en: Total costs per square meter starting from a minimum value
